moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off!
moments.blurb: The 139th Wimbledon Championships begin on Monday, June 29th, bringing two weeks of world-class grass-court tennis to London's All England Club.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 serves up its first matches tomorrow. Who are you backing for the title?

angles.name: London Buzz
angles.copy: The buzz is building in SW19! Wimbledon kicks off tomorrow, bringing tennis fever to London. Who's heading to the queues?

moments.title: British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix 2026 roars into Silverstone from July 3rd to 5th, featuring a Sprint weekend for the first time since 2021.

angles.name: Countdown
angles.copy: Five days until the British Grand Prix! Get ready for a weekend of high-speed drama at Silverstone, including a Sprint race. Who's taking pole?

angles.name: Weekend Plans
angles.copy: Your weekend plans, sorted: the British Grand Prix is nearly here! Expect thrills, spills, and incredible racing from July 3rd-5th.

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Round of 32
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues today with Round of 32 matches, broadcast live on ITV1.

angles.name: Match Day
angles.copy: It's World Cup action today! The Round of 32 is LIVE on ITV1. Who are you cheering for?

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: The World Cup knockout stages are heating up! Don't miss the Round of 32 games happening today.

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted across various UK cities, culminates with the final match in London on July 5th.

angles.name: Cricket Final
angles.copy: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup final is just a week away! Who will be crowned champions in London?

angles.name: Women's Sport
angles.copy: History in the making! Get ready for the thrilling ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final next Sunday.

moments.title: Austrian Grand Prix Final Day
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Lenovo Austrian Grand Prix 2026 concludes today, June 28th, with the main race at the Red Bull Ring.

angles.name: Race Day
angles.copy: It's race day in Austria! The F1 Austrian Grand Prix concludes today. Tune in for all the final lap drama!

angles.name: F1 Action
angles.copy: Who's taking the top step of the podium at the Austrian Grand Prix? Find out as the final race unfolds today!

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival Continues
moments.blurb: The inaugural Blenheim Palace Festival runs until July 4th, with Alanis Morissette performing tonight, June 28th, and Katy Perry on July 1st.

angles.name: Tonight's Headliner
angles.copy: Alanis Morissette live at Blenheim Palace tonight! What a setting for a legend. What's your favourite Jagged Little Pill track?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Blenheim Palace Festival is in full swing! Katy Perry, Michael Bublé, Teddy Swims and Pete Tong still to come this week. Who are you seeing?

moments.title: Bad Bunny Live in London
moments.blurb: Puerto Rican superstar Bad Bunny performs the final night of his 'DeBÍ TiRAR MáS FOToS World Tour' in London tonight, June 28th, at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

angles.name: Last Night London
angles.copy: Bad Bunny takes over Tottenham Hotspur Stadium for his final London show tonight! Expect a massive party. Have you got tickets?

angles.name: Global Superstar
angles.copy: It's the last chance to catch Bad Bunny on his 'DeBÍ TiRAR MáS FOToS' tour in London tonight. What's your favourite track from the global sensation?

moments.title: Metallica's M72 World Tour in London
moments.blurb: Metal legends Metallica bring their 'No Repeat Weekend' M72 World Tour to London Stadium on July 3rd and 5th, with two completely different setlists.

angles.name: Metal Mayhem
angles.copy: Metallica are hitting London next week for two nights of epic metal! What tracks are you hoping to hear on their 'No Repeat Weekend'?

angles.name: Iconic Venue
angles.copy: London Stadium gets ready to host Metallica next week! It's going to be huge. Who's got tickets for the M72 World Tour?

moments.title: Sounds of the City Manchester
moments.blurb: Manchester's Castlefield Bowl hosts 'Sounds of the City' from July 3rd, featuring The K's, Hacienda Classical, The Streets and more.

angles.name: Manchester Gigs
angles.copy: Sounds of the City kicks off next week at Castlefield Bowl! The K's, Hacienda Classical, The Streets are all set to play. Which night are you there?

angles.name: Summer in the City
angles.copy: Manchester's Castlefield Bowl is ready for 'Sounds of the City' starting next week! Get your tickets for an incredible line-up.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Cheryl!
moments.blurb: Cheryl Ann Tweedy, the pop superstar known from Girls Aloud and her solo career, turns 42 on June 30th, 2026.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 42nd Birthday to the incredible Cheryl on June 30th! What's your all-time favourite Girls Aloud or solo hit?

angles.name: Girls Aloud Icon
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Pop icon Cheryl turns 42 on Tuesday. Which of her tracks gets you on the dancefloor every time?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Debbie Harry!
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead singer of Blondie, celebrates her 80th birthday on July 1st, 2026.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to the legendary Debbie Harry on Wednesday! What's your favourite Blondie track that still sounds fresh today?

angles.name: Timeless Style
angles.copy: From 'Heart of Glass' to 'Rapture', Debbie Harry is a true icon. Wishing her a very happy 80th on July 1st!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1st, 2026.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Get your freak on! Wishing a huge Happy 55th Birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott on Wednesday! What's your favourite Missy track?

angles.name: Game Changer
angles.copy: A true pioneer! Missy Elliott celebrates her birthday on July 1st. Her influence on music is undeniable. Which of her hits is your go-to?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Vince Clarke!
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, turns 66 on July 3rd, 2026.

angles.name: Synth Legend
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the electronic music maestro, Vince Clarke, on July 3rd! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, what's his best work?

angles.name: Erasure Icon
angles.copy: Three days until Vince Clarke's birthday! Celebrate the genius behind so many iconic 80s hits. Which Erasure song is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr!
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer and solo artist, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th, 2026.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Peace and love! Ringo Starr turns 86 on July 7th. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Solo Hits
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to Ringo Starr next Tuesday! Celebrate his incredible career, from the Fab Four to his fantastic solo work. What's your favourite?

moments.title: UK Heatwave & Thunderstorm Risk
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing an intense heatwave across England and Wales with temperatures in the mid-30s, potentially reaching 38-39°C, with a risk of thunderstorms as cooler air arrives.

angles.name: Weather Alert
angles.copy: Stay safe and hydrated! The UK heatwave continues today across England and Wales, with temperatures soaring. Thunderstorms are also possible.

angles.name: Cooler Air Coming
angles.copy: After a scorching few days, cooler air is on the way! But for now, it's still very hot across parts of the UK, with a risk of storms.

moments.title: The Vardys Reality Show
moments.blurb: ITV's new reality show 'The Vardys' follows Jamie and Rebekah Vardy as they move their family to Italy for a fresh start.

angles.name: Reality Buzz
angles.copy: Have you been watching 'The Vardys' on ITV? Jamie and Rebekah Vardy's move to Italy is providing plenty of drama!

angles.name: Footballer's Life
angles.copy: From 'Wagatha' to Italy! 'The Vardys' gives us a peek into Jamie and Rebekah's new life. What do you think of their big move?

moments.title: UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart continues to highlight the nation's biggest hits, with recent chart-toppers and rising stars like Olivia Dean, Raye, and Bella Kay making waves.

angles.name: Chart Talk
angles.copy: What's topping your playlist from the Official UK Singles Chart right now? Lots of amazing new music making waves!

angles.name: New Music Vibes
angles.copy: From Olivia Dean's 'Man I Need' to Raye's 'WHERE IS MY HUSBAND!', the UK charts are packed with hits. What's your current favourite?
